channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Japan Airlines was hit by a cyberattack, delaying flights during the year-end holiday season
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan Airlines said it was hit by a cyberattack Thursday, causing delays to more than 20 domestic flights but the carrier said it was able to stop the onslaught and restore its systems hours later. There was no impact on flight safety, it said.
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Undersea power cable linking Finland and Estonia hit by outage, prompting investigation
item.description: FRANKFURT, Germany (AP) — A power cable linking Finland and Estonia under the Baltic Sea suffered an outage, prompting an investigation, Finnish Prime Minister Petteri Orpo said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Oh the irony: T-Mobile launches Internet Backup plans for businesses on the day it suffered its biggest outage of 2024
item.description: T-Mobile's enhanced Internet Backup plans provide 130GB of 5G data monthly, with three additional data passes per year.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: AI use cases are going to get even bigger in 2025
item.description: Over the past two years, generative AI has dominated tech conversations and media headlines. Tools like ChatGPT, Gemini, Midjourney, and Sora captured imaginations with their ability to create text, images, and videos, sparking both excitement and ethical debates.
item.dc:creator: Kolawole Samuel Adebayo, Fast Company

item.title: Trump brings Silicon Valley to Washington
item.description: Silicon Valley is coming to Washington in force, as tech leaders take on prominent roles — both official and unofficial — in President-elect Trump’s second term.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Cómo hablar con la junta directiva sobre la deuda tecnológica
item.description: Cuando su director ejecutivo o director financiero le pregunta sobre el presupuesto necesario para la remediación de la deuda técnica, ¿se encuentra con dificultades para justificar la inversión? No es el único.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Analítica prescriptiva: el siguiente nivel para impulsar el futuro de la experiencia del cliente
item.description: La analítica prescriptiva va un paso más allá y no solo predice lo que podría suceder, sino que recomienda las mejores acciones para lograr un resultado positivo.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Chat with Santa or find out if you are on the naughty list with these tech features
item.description: You can access the new (and limited!) Santa Chat feature through the ChatGPT app by starting a new chat, hitting the live chat button.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, NewsNation

item.title: IT leaders’ top 9 takeaways from 2024
item.description: The past year was another one of rapid change, as economic cycles, business trends, and technology itself evolved at a breakneck pace.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Trump pushes back on 'President Musk' claims
item.description: President-elect Trump on Sunday rejected the recent dubbing of tech billionaire Elon Musk as “President Musk” by Democrats. “No, he’s not gonna be president, that I can tell you,” Trump said at conservative group Turning Point's “America Fest” in Phoenix, Ariz.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: AI cameras are giving DC's air defense a major upgrade
item.description: Artificial intelligence-based cameras are giving air defense operators unprecedented capabilities in monitoring and protecting airspace.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Amazon workers are striking at multiple facilities. Here's what you should know
item.description: Amazon workers affiliated with the Teamsters union continued a strike Friday at seven of the company's delivery hubs just days before Christmas. At midnight on Saturday, workers at a prominent unionized warehouse in New York will also join, the Teamsters said.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: WordPress.org statement threatens possible shutdown for all of 2025
item.description: Automattic CEO Matt Mullenweg on Friday announced a shutdown of almost all services on WordPress.org, the open source project site that’s the home of the software, plugins, and the WordPress community, but was unclear on when the shutdown would end.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: VA EHR to resume rollout in mid-2026, after clinicians see fewer crashes
item.description: The VA says clinicians are seeing fewer interruptions from the new EHR, and that the average user now sees “near zero interruptions,” such as freezes or lags. The post VA EHR to resume rollout in mid-2026, after clinicians see fewer crashes first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: Scholz dismisses Musk's assertion that only a far-right party can 'save' Germany
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — Chancellor Olaf Scholz on Friday dismissed an assertion by Elon Musk that only a far-right party can “save Germany,” but said that freedom of opinion "also goes for multibillionaires.” Germany is expected to vote in an early election on Feb.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cost-conscious repatriation strategies
item.description: In recent years, the cloud computing landscape has undergone a seismic shift. After fully embracing the potential of public cloud services, many companies are reevaluating their strategies and shifting workloads back to on-premises infrastructures.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: If Meta prevails against Apple in Europe, AI surveillance will be a feature, not a bug
item.description: Anyone using any digital device needs to wise up to a looming threat as Meta attempts to exploit the Europe Union’s continued assault against the Apple ecosystem to launch what seems to be an open season on your privacy.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Elon Musk considers funding Nigel Farage's populist party, a move that could shake up UK politics
item.description: LONDON (AP) — It’s a photo that sent a tremor through British politics: Elon Musk flanked by British politician Nigel Farage and a wealthy backer, in front of a gilt-framed painting of a young Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: JILL LAWLESS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Apple complains Meta requests risk privacy in spat over EU efforts to widen access to iPhone tech
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple complained that requests from Meta Platforms for access to its operating software threaten user privacy, in a spat fueled by the European Union's intensifying efforts to get the iPhone maker to open up to products from tech rivals.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4
